description: Per-case benchmark summary with timing and throughput statistics.
Per-case aggregate summary across independent outer runs.
QMD-ready summary with derived scaling, speedup, and matched-resource ranking fields.
Per-iteration elapsed times and status for every case.

Explicit requested-versus-effective resource plans, including adaptive auto_threads resolutions.

Comparator-based correctness preflight on a normalized subset of the representative file.
Benchmark file manifest with source, size, and selection flags.
Host machine and runtime metadata for the run.
Threading-related environment variables captured for the run.
Parsed CLI options and effective benchmark configuration.
R session information for package and platform provenance.
Auto-generated single-file BamScale scaling plot, if ggplot2 is available.
Auto-generated multi-file scaling plot, if ggplot2 is available.
